quality_gates.name: Program terms freshness
quality_gates.required_evidence: Candidate report includes current Immunefi rules, Optimism information page, Optimism scope page, and retrieval timestamp.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Any report uses stale or uncited program terms.

quality_gates.name: Asset in scope
quality_gates.required_evidence: Candidate maps the affected component to the Optimism asset scope table and category.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Affected asset is missing, third-party-only, retired, or not tied to an in-scope Optimism asset.

quality_gates.name: Impact in scope
quality_gates.required_evidence: Candidate maps the alleged impact to an explicit Optimism in-scope impact and Immunefi severity class.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Impact is inferred, best-practice-only, purely theoretical, or listed as out of scope.

quality_gates.name: Known issue and duplicate clearance
quality_gates.required_evidence: Candidate passes optimism-known-issue-duplicate-matrix-v1 controls with row-level notes.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Candidate overlaps known issue tables, duplicate routes, public disclosures, upstream-only routes, or default out-of-scope rows.

quality_gates.name: No prohibited testing
quality_gates.required_evidence: Candidate proof plan is local-only and explicitly excludes mainnet, public testnet, automated target traffic, DoS, phishing, and third-party systems.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Proof depends on live target interaction or any prohibited activity.

quality_gates.name: Runnable local PoC plan
quality_gates.required_evidence: Candidate includes a runnable local PoC or a precise local PoC build plan with commands, fixtures, expected output, and failure mode.
quality_gates.fail_condition: PoC is only prose, pseudocode, screenshots, or a contract dump.

quality_gates.name: Exploitability and preconditions
quality_gates.required_evidence: Candidate states attacker capabilities, required privileges, chain state assumptions, timing assumptions, and any unusual user interaction.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Exploit requires unstated privileged access, unrealistic oracle behavior, governance capture, or unproven environment control.

quality_gates.name: Economic impact quantification
quality_gates.required_evidence: Candidate estimates direct funds at risk, affected assets, impacted users/protocols, and maximum plausible damage.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Impact is not quantified or selected impact does not match evidence.

quality_gates.name: Severity classification alignment
quality_gates.required_evidence: Candidate maps impact to Immunefi v2.3 severity language and Optimism reward category without overstating severity.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Severity is misclassified, exaggerated, or mismatched to impact/asset category.

quality_gates.name: Minimal reproduction and logs
quality_gates.required_evidence: Candidate records exact reproduction steps, local command output, logs, diffs, traces, or state assertions.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Reviewer cannot reproduce the issue from local artifacts.

quality_gates.name: Root cause and affected code path
quality_gates.required_evidence: Candidate identifies the vulnerable code path, invariant violation, missing check, or protocol design failure.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Report only shows symptoms or broad suspicion.

quality_gates.name: Remediation guidance
quality_gates.required_evidence: Candidate proposes a specific mitigation, patch direction, or invariant to enforce.
quality_gates.fail_condition: No actionable recommendation or recommendation breaks intended behavior.

quality_gates.name: Report quality structure
quality_gates.required_evidence: Draft has title, summary, affected asset, vulnerability details, impact, risk breakdown, PoC, remediation, references, and scope notes.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Draft is vague, three-line, AI-spray-like, missing runnable proof, or not in English.

quality_gates.name: KYC and payout awareness
quality_gates.required_evidence: Draft packet states that KYC may be required for payout and that no payout account setup is authorized here.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Agent assumes payout path or asks for sensitive personal/payment data.

quality_gates.name: Responsible publication guard
quality_gates.required_evidence: Draft packet records no public disclosure and no publication without the program's responsible-publication approval path.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Candidate suggests public post, GitHub issue, social thread, or disclosure before fix/payment/approval.

quality_gates.name: Submission authorization
quality_gates.required_evidence: A separate approved security_report_submission_gate service request exists for the exact program, asset, report, and route.
quality_gates.fail_condition: No exact approved service request exists.

quality_gates.name: Side-effect audit
quality_gates.required_evidence: Validation confirms no browser/account/service-request assignment/worker/runtime/security-test/report/public/wallet/payment/external side effects.
quality_gates.fail_condition: Any side effect occurred without exact approval.

summary.next_action: Use this gate before any Optimism target-specific code review, report draft, or submission packet.
